data.content:
The build confirms the issue. The file is generated successfully (`obj/Debug/net8.0/Generated/GeneratedInfo.cs`), but it's never added to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild's implicit globbing expands at **evaluation time** (before targets run), so files created during the build aren't automatically picked up.

**Fix:** Add the generated file to the `Compile` and `FileWrites` item groups inside the target.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation and track it for Clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and successfully generates the file, but the generated file is never added to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild's implicit globbing happens at evaluation time (before any targets execute), so the file generated during the build isn't picked up automatically.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group within the target, after generating it. I also need to add it to `FileWrites` so it gets cleaned properly.

Let me fix this by adding an `<ItemGroup>` inside the target that includes the generated file in the `Compile` items.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Add the generated file to compilation and track it for Clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds now. Here's the diagnosis:

**Problem:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates `GeneratedInfo.cs` during the build, but never adds it to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild's implicit file globbing runs at **evaluation time** (before any targets execute), so dynamically created files are invisible to the compiler.

**Fix:** Added an `<ItemGroup>` inside the target to include the generated file in `Compile` (so Roslyn compiles it) and `FileWrites` (so `dotnet clean` removes it).
